blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 51 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
